targets.boundary: Global Scope 1, Scope 2 market-based, and Scope 3 business air travel emissions
targets.notes: Microsoft’s goal is to be carbon neutral every year since fiscal year 2013 by matching emissions within the carbon neutrality boundary with an equivalent amount of carbon offsets.
targets.title: Annual carbon neutrality

targets.notes: By 2050 Microsoft expects to have removed from the environment all the carbon the company has emitted either directly or by electrical consumption since it was founded in 1975.
targets.title: Carbon negative removal target by 2050
